title: Special Methods and Pythonic Object Behavior · Python Build Room
summary: Make domain values readable, comparable, hashable, iterable, callable, and resource-safe only where meaningful. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of Pythonic domain and collection objects while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Implement __repr__ for unambiguous developer evidence and __str__ for user-facing text without leaking secrets.
Implement equality and ordering with NotImplemented, compatible types, and a coherent domain comparison key.
Implement hashing only for stable equality state and preserve the rule that equal objects have equal hashes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
